---
title: "The Rt. Rev. and Hon Hugh Percy"
---

## The Rt. Rev. and Hon Hugh Percy

**Dates:** (1784–1856)

### Description

Bishop of Carlisle

### Biography

He served as bishop from 1827 to his death and was unpopular and eccentric.

### Letters

- Letter from June 10th [1852]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
